type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
summary: Done: added transform_callback kwarg to exif_transpose (both overloads + body), building 'methods' list from callback result (single Transpose, sequence, or None) or falling back to default mapping; transpose loop now iterates over methods list instead of single method call. Added Union import from typing and Callable from collections.abc. Please rebase your strip_metadata changes on top of the methods-list loop rather than the old single 'method' variable.

type: STATUS

summary: My sandbox shows no methods-list refactor from you - we appear to be in separate copies of the repo, each submitting independent patches. Finalizing my strip_metadata change against the original single-method implementation.
